title: psilothonna tagetes
intro: Psilothonna tagetes, also known as the yellow bush or yellow daisy bush, is a plant species native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which contain compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Psilothonna tagetes include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
